instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall switch to Eco mode when Eco mode request is active.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate Eco shift strategy when Driving_Mode_Request equals Eco.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode_Request = Eco THEN Set_Transmission_Mode = Eco

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall switch to Sport mode when Sport mode request is active.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate sport shift strategy when Driving_Mode_Request equals Sport.

L4_requirements: IF Driving_Mode_Request = Sport THEN Set_Transmission_Mode = Sport

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow manual mode activation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable manual gear control when Manual_Mode_Request equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Manual_Mode_Request = TRUE THEN Set_Transmission_Mode = Manual

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent mode change during gear shifting.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block mode transition when Shift_State equals Active.

L4_requirements: IF Mode_Change_Request = TRUE AND Shift_State = Active THEN Maintain_Current_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall update shift maps when mode changes.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall load corresponding shift map when driving mode changes.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall validate mode transition conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify vehicle speed before allowing mode transition.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable mode transition during fault condition.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall block driving mode change when System_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall ensure smooth torque control during mode transition.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall adjust engine torque during driving mode switch.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect invalid mode transition.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when requested mode is unsupported.

L4_requirements: IF Requested_Mode NOT_IN Supported_Mode_List THEN Mode_Transition_Fault = TRUE
IF Requested_Mode IN Supported_Mode_List THEN Continue_Mode_Transition

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall confirm mode transition completion.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall set system state when mode transition completes.
